scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/web && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/server
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
